req-f8eb8cc5.evidence: plumber.py stores state in .plumb/ directory with schema including requirements.json, decisions.jsonl, gaps.json, config.json, and code_coverage_map.json

req-67e3ad68.evidence: plumber.py is a single self-contained Python script using only stdlib imports (argparse, hashlib, json, re, sys, datetime, pathlib, subprocess)

req-958ba67c.evidence: parse_spec_from_text() function uses regex (BULLET_RE) to extract bullet points without any LLM call

req-64ed0d82.evidence: req_id() function computes req-<sha256(text.strip().lower())[:8]> format in line 64-65

req-e6c0d566.evidence: save_requirements() in plumber.py writes requirements.json with fields: id, source_file, source_section, text, ambiguous, created_at, last_seen_commit (lines 82-84)

req-5b8b8fc0.evidence: compute_gaps() uses _keywords() to extract keywords and _file_contains_any() to grep test/source files (lines 203-220)

req-d1f94c2d.evidence: compute_gaps() writes gaps.json with fields: requirement_id, text, has_test, has_code (lines 214-219)

req-4293d677.evidence: load_config() reads .plumb/config.json with spec_paths, test_paths, source_paths; DEFAULT_CONFIG shows these fields (lines 38-42, 68-73)

req-8f985d78.evidence: cmd_status() reports requirement count, gap count, and pending decision count (lines 241-259)

req-e414e762.evidence: cmd_decisions() reads decisions.jsonl from .plumb/ and filters for pending status (lines 265-267)

req-51e8c42f.evidence: cmd_approve() sets status to 'approved' and records resolved_at timestamp (lines 292-309)

req-30925d84.evidence: cmd_approve() supports --all flag to approve all pending decisions (lines 294-301)

req-8ad072bb.evidence: cmd_reject() sets status to 'rejected', records reject_reason and resolved_at (lines 312-318)

req-bee78fca.evidence: cmd_ignore() sets status to 'ignored' and records resolved_at timestamp (lines 321-323)

req-f4e1a8e0.evidence: cmd_edit() updates decision text and sets edited_at timestamp while keeping status as pending (lines 326-331)

req-b3b1046b.evidence: All mutations use _mutate_decision() which loads, updates, and saves decisions.jsonl; no direct file edits

req-7ec7755f.evidence: SKILL.md documents that sync updates spec bullet points; cmd_sync() implements this by reading approved decisions and replacing spec text

req-1b82f41d.evidence: cmd_sync() generates test stubs by reading test files and appending test_<slug> functions

req-82c7673a.evidence: cmd_sync() re-runs gaps after sync and reports closed gaps

req-a389a385.evidence: cmd_stage() stages .plumb/ directory, spec_paths, and test_paths using git add

req-fa199100.evidence: SETUP.md documents the fix for LLM dedup step in pre-commit hook using program_models config

req-ea5b9c91.evidence: SKILL.md documents session pre-flight: check config, parse-spec, gaps before reporting status

req-079b5c52.evidence: SKILL.md explicitly requires using AskUserQuestion to present decisions with multiple-choice UI

req-92108d8e.evidence: SKILL.md Rule section: 'NEVER approve, reject, or edit decisions without explicit user instruction'

req-af627f29.evidence: cmd_coverage() reports three dimensions: spec-to-test, spec-to-code, decision resolution rate

req-79def47a.evidence: cmd_check() inspects git diff --staged and generates decision records by comparing changes against requirements

req-96cbb257.evidence: SETUP.md documents the dedup step fix for future sessions

req-71e14304.evidence: cmd_create_decision() subcommand exists in plumber.py and SKILL.md can use it instead of inline writes
